mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens ( user_no, token_hash, device_info, ip_address, expiry_date, revoked ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{tokenHash}, #{deviceInfo}, #{ipAddress}, #{expiryDate}, #{revoked} )
mapper.select: SELECT no, user_no, token_hash, device_info, ip_address, expiry_date, revoked, created_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
